flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trevecca Nazarene University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.9k → $31.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trevecca Nazarene University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.9k → $31.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trevecca Nazarene University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
